AllowVendedLogDeliveryForResource.description: Grants permission to deliver logs for a global resolver

AssociateHostedZone.description: Grants permission to associate a resource to a hosted zone

BatchCreateFirewallRule.description: Grants permission to create multiple firewall rules

BatchDeleteFirewallRule.description: Grants permission to delete multiple firewall rules

BatchUpdateFirewallRule.description: Grants permission to update multiple firewall rules

CreateAccessSource.description: Grants permission to create an access source

CreateAccessToken.description: Grants permission to create an access token

CreateDNSView.description: Grants permission to create a dns view

CreateFirewallDomainList.description: Grants permission to create a firewall domain list

CreateFirewallRule.description: Grants permission to create a firewall rule

CreateGlobalResolver.description: Grants permission to create a global resolver

DeleteAccessSource.description: Grants permission to delete an access source

DeleteAccessToken.description: Grants permission to delete an access token

DeleteDNSView.description: Grants permission to delete a dns view

DeleteFirewallDomainList.description: Grants permission to delete a firewall domain list

DeleteFirewallRule.description: Grants permission to delete a firewall rule

DeleteGlobalResolver.description: Grants permission to delete a global resolver

DisableDNSView.description: Grants permission to disable a dns view

DisassociateHostedZone.description: Grants permission to disassociate a hosted zone from a resource

EnableDNSView.description: Grants permission to enable a dns view

GetAccessSource.description: Grants permission to get an access source

GetAccessToken.description: Grants permission to get an access token

GetDNSView.description: Grants permission to get a dns view

GetFirewallDomainList.description: Grants permission to get a firewall domain list

GetFirewallRule.description: Grants permission to get a firewall rule

GetGlobalResolver.description: Grants permission to get a global resolver

GetHostedZoneAssociation.description: Grants permission to get a hosted zone association

GetManagedFirewallDomainList.description: Grants permission to get a managed firewall domain list

ImportFirewallDomains.description: Grants permission to import firewall domains from an S3 bucket

ListAccessSources.description: Grants permission to list access sources

ListAccessTokens.description: Grants permission to list access tokens

ListDNSViews.description: Grants permission to list dns views

ListFirewallDomainLists.description: Grants permission to list firewall domain lists

ListFirewallDomains.description: Grants permission to list firewall domains

ListFirewallRules.description: Grants permission to list firewall rules

ListGlobalResolvers.description: Grants permission to list global resolvers

ListHostedZoneAssociations.description: Grants permission to list hosted zone associations

ListManagedFirewallDomainLists.description: Grants permission to list managed firewall domain lists

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateAccessSource.description: Grants permission to update an access source

UpdateAccessToken.description: Grants permission to update an access token

UpdateDNSView.description: Grants permission to update a dns view

UpdateFirewallDomains.description: Grants permission to update firewall domains

UpdateFirewallRule.description: Grants permission to update an firewall rule

UpdateGlobalResolver.description: Grants permission to update a global resolver

UpdateHostedZoneAssociation.description: Grants permission to update a hosted zone association

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair that is allowed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair of a resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by a list of tag keys that are allowed in the request
